          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\"use client\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import { useState, useTransition } from \"react\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "import { Plus, Pencil, Trash, FileType2 } from \"lucide-react\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "import { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "import { PageHeader } from \"@/components/page-header\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "import { deleteExamPhrase } from \"./actions\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "import { toast } from \"sonner\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "import { PhraseSheet } from \"@/components/configuracoes/PhraseSheet\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "export function PhrasesClient({ phrases }: { phrases: any[] }) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "  const [sheetOpen, setSheetOpen] = useState(false);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "  const [editingPhrase, setEditingPhrase] = useState\u003cany | null\u003e(null);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "  const [isPending, startTransition] = useTransition();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  const handleNew = () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    setEditingPhrase(null);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    setSheetOpen(true);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "  const handleEdit = (p: any) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    setEditingPhrase(p);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "    setSheetOpen(true);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "  const handleDelete = (id: string, label: string) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    if (!confirm(&#96;Tem certeza que deseja excluir a frase \"${label}\"?&#96;)) return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "    startTransition(async () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "      const res = await deleteExamPhrase(id);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "      if (res.error) toast.error(\"Falha ao excluir\", { description: res.error });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "      else toast.success(\"Frase excluída com sucesso\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "  // Group phrases by category"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "  const grouped = phrases.reduce((acc, phrase) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "// ────── EXAM REQUESTS ──────"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": " * Creates an exam_request + the first exam_item, then redirects to the editor."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": " */"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "export async function createExamRequest(formData: FormData) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "  const raw = Object.fromEntries(formData);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "  const parsed = CreateExamRequestSchema.safeParse(raw);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "  if (!parsed.success) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    return { error: parsed.error.flatten().fieldErrors };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "  const { supabase, user } = await getAuthUser();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "  // 1. Create the exam_request (atendimento)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "  const { data: request, error: reqErr } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_requests\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "    .insert({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "      user_id: user.id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "      patient_id: parsed.data.patient_id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "      unit_id: parsed.data.unit_id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "      date: parsed.data.date ?? new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "      notes: parsed.data.notes,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "      status: \"pending\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    })"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    .select(\"id\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "    .single();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "  if (reqErr || !request) return { error: reqErr?.message ?? \"Erro ao criar atendimento\" };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "  // 2. Create the exam_item (laudo) linked to template"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "  const { data: item, error: itemErr } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_items\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "    .insert({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "      user_id: user.id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "      request_id: request.id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "      template_id: parsed.data.template_id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "      status: \"in_progress\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "      form_snapshot: { variable_selections: {} } satisfies ExamFormSnapshot,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "    })"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "    .select(\"id\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    .single();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "  if (itemErr || !item) return { error: itemErr?.message ?? \"Erro ao criar laudo\" };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "  // Update request status to in_progress"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "  await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_requests\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "    .update({ status: \"in_progress\" })"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "    .eq(\"id\", request.id);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "  revalidatePath(\"/laudos\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "  redirect(&#96;/laudos/${request.id}/${item.id}&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "// ────── EXAM ITEMS ──────"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "/** Auto-save the exam item (draft). */"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "export async function saveExamItem("

          },

            "text": "export function ModelSheet({ open, onOpenChange, template, units }: ModelSheetProps) {"

          },

            "text": "      setUnitId(template?.unit_id ?? \"all\");"

          },

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "export async function saveExamTemplate(rawData: any, templateId?: string) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "  const { supabase, user } = await getAuthUser();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "  const parsed = ExamTemplateSchema.safeParse(rawData);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "  if (!parsed.success) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    return { error: parsed.error.flatten().fieldErrors };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "  if (templateId) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "    const { error } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "      .from(\"exam_templates\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "      .update(parsed.data)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "      .eq(\"id\", templateId)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "      .eq(\"user_id\", user.id);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    if (error) return { error: error.message };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "  } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    const { error } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "      .from(\"exam_templates\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "      .insert({ ...parsed.data, user_id: user.id });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    if (error) return { error: error.message };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "  revalidatePath(\"/configuracoes/modelos\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "  return { success: true };"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "export async function deleteExamTemplate(templateId: string) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "  const { supabase, user } = await getAuthUser();"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "}"
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "interface PageProps {"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": ";"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "export default async function EditorPage({ params }: PageProps) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "  const { requestId, itemId } = await params;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "  const supabase = await createClient();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "  const {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    data: { user },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "  if (!user) redirect(\"/auth/login\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "  // Fetch exam item with template and request context"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "  const { data: item } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_items\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    .select("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "      &#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "      id, status, form_snapshot, updated_at,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "      exam_templates ( id, title, technique, description, impression, variables ),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "      exam_requests!inner ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        id, status, date, notes,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        patients ( id, name, birth_date, cpf, gender ),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        units ( id, name, report_header, report_footer )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "      )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    &#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    .eq(\"id\", itemId)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    .eq(\"request_id\", requestId)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    .eq(\"user_id\", user.id)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    .single();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "  if (!item) notFound();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "  // Fetch phrases for the sidebar"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "  const { data: phrases } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_phrases\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "    .select(\"id, category, label, content\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    .eq(\"user_id\", user.id)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "    .order(\"category\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "    .order(\"label\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "  // Fetch profile for signature"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "  const { data: profile } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    .from(\"profiles\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    .select(\"full_name, crm, signature\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "    .eq(\"id\", user.id)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "    .single();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "  type TemplateRow = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    id: string;"
          },

            "text": "const UNIT_COOKIE = \"radflow_active_unit_id\""
          },

            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "export default async function LaudosPage({searchParams}: PageProps) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "  const {page: pageParam, status: statusParam, from: fromParam, to: toParam} = await searchParams"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "  const currentPage = Math.max(1, parseInt(pageParam ?? \"1\", 10))"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "  const offset = (currentPage - 1) * PAGE_SIZE"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "  const cookieStore = await cookies()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "  const unitId = cookieStore.get(UNIT_COOKIE)?.value"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "  const supabase = await createClient()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "  const {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    data: {user}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "  } = await supabase.auth.getUser()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "  if (!user) redirect(\"/auth/login\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "  let query = supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_requests\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    .select("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "      &#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "      id, status, date, notes, created_at,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "      patients ( id, name, cpf ),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "      units ( id, name ),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "      exam_items ( id )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    &#96;,"

          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "      {count: \"exact\"}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "    .eq(\"user_id\", user.id)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "    .order(\"date\", {ascending: false})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    .order(\"created_at\", {ascending: false})"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "    .range(offset, offset + PAGE_SIZE - 1)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "  if (statusParam \u0026\u0026 [\"pending\", \"in_progress\", \"completed\"].includes(statusParam)) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    query = query.eq(\"status\", statusParam)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "  if (fromParam) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "    query = query.gte(\"date\", fromParam)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "  if (toParam) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "    query = query.lte(\"date\", toParam)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "  if (unitId) {"

          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "    query = query.eq(\"unit_id\", unitId)"

          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "  }"

          {
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "  const {data: requests, count} = await query"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "  const totalPages = Math.ceil((count ?? 0) / PAGE_SIZE)"

          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },

            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "  return ("

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "// ────── EXAM REQUESTS ──────"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": " * Creates an exam_request + the first exam_item, then redirects to the editor."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": " */"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "export async function createExamRequest(formData: FormData) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "  const raw = Object.fromEntries(formData);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "  const parsed = CreateExamRequestSchema.safeParse(raw);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "  if (!parsed.success) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    return { error: parsed.error.flatten().fieldErrors };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "  const { supabase, user } = await getAuthUser();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "  // 1. Create the exam_request (atendimento)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "  const { data: request, error: reqErr } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_requests\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "    .insert({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "      user_id: user.id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "      patient_id: parsed.data.patient_id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "      unit_id: parsed.data.unit_id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "      date: parsed.data.date ?? new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0],"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "      notes: parsed.data.notes,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "      status: \"pending\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    })"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    .select(\"id\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "    .single();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "  if (reqErr || !request) return { error: reqErr?.message ?? \"Erro ao criar atendimento\" };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "  // 2. Create the exam_item (laudo) linked to template"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "  const { data: item, error: itemErr } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_items\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "    .insert({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "      user_id: user.id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "      request_id: request.id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "      template_id: parsed.data.template_id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "      status: \"in_progress\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "      form_snapshot: { variable_selections: {} } satisfies ExamFormSnapshot,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "    })"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "    .select(\"id\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    .single();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "  if (itemErr || !item) return { error: itemErr?.message ?? \"Erro ao criar laudo\" };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "  // Update request status to in_progress"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "  await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_requests\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "    .update({ status: \"in_progress\" })"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "    .eq(\"id\", request.id);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "  revalidatePath(\"/laudos\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "  redirect(&#96;/laudos/${request.id}/${item.id}&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "// ────── EXAM ITEMS ──────"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "/** Auto-save the exam item (draft). */"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "export async function saveExamItem("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "  itemId: string,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "  snapshot: Partial\u003cExamFormSnapshot\u003e"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": ") {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {

            "column": 1,

          }

          },

            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "export const ExamPhraseSchema = z.object({"

            "text": "});"
          },
          {

            "text": "interface PageProps {"

          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "export default async function EditorPage({ params }: PageProps) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "  const { requestId, itemId } = await params;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "  const supabase = await createClient();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "  const {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    data: { user },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "  if (!user) redirect(\"/auth/login\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "  // Fetch exam item with template and request context"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "  const { data: item } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_items\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "    .select("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "      &#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "      id, status, form_snapshot, updated_at,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "      exam_templates ( id, title, technique, description, impression, variables ),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "      exam_requests!inner ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        id, status, date, notes,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        patients ( id, name, birth_date, cpf, gender ),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        units ( id, name, report_header, report_footer )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "      )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    &#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    .eq(\"id\", itemId)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    .eq(\"request_id\", requestId)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    .eq(\"user_id\", user.id)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "    .single();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "  if (!item) notFound();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "  // Fetch phrases for the sidebar"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "  const { data: phrases } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_phrases\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "    .select(\"id, category, label, content\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    .eq(\"user_id\", user.id)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "    .order(\"category\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "    .order(\"label\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "  // Fetch profile for signature"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "  const { data: profile } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    .from(\"profiles\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    .select(\"full_name, crm, signature\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "    .eq(\"id\", user.id)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "    .single();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "  type TemplateRow = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    id: string;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "    title: string;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "    technique: string | null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "    description: string | null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "    impression: string | null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "    variables: unknown;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "  type RequestRow = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "    id: string;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "    status: string;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "    date: string;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": ";"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "}"
          }

          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "export function NovoLaudoForm({ units, templates }: NovoLaudoFormProps) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "const filteredTemplates = "

            "lineNumber": 87
          },

            "lineNumber": 88
          },

            "text": "    : [];"

          {
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "  const handlePatientSearch = useCallback(async (query: string) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "    setPatientQuery(query);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "    clearTimeout(searchDebounceRef.current);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "    if (query.length \u003c 2) { setPatientResults([]); return; }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "    searchDebounceRef.current = setTimeout(async () =\u003e {"
          },
          {

            "text": "      setIsSearching(true);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "      setIsSearching(false);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "    }, 300);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "  }, []);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "  const handleOpenNewPatientSheet = () =\u003e {"
          },
          {

            "text": "    setPatientOpen(false);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "    setPatientSheetOpen(true);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "  const handlePatientCreated = (patient: {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "    id: string;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "    name: string;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "    cpf: string | null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "    birth_date: string | null;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "  }) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "    setSelectedPatient(patient);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "    setPatientSheetOpen(false);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "    toast.success(&#96;Paciente \"${patient.name}\" adicionado!&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "    e.preventDefault();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "    if (!selectedPatient) { toast.error(\"Selecione um paciente\"); return; }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "    if (!unitId) { toast.error(\"Selecione uma unidade\"); return; }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "    if (!templateId) { toast.error(\"Selecione um modelo de exame\"); return; }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "    const formData = new FormData();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "    formData.set(\"patient_id\", selectedPatient.id);"

            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "    startTransition(async () =\u003e {"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "      if (result?.error) {"

          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "        toast.error(\"Erro ao criar atendimento. Verifique os dados.\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,

          },

            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "      // On success, createExamRequest redirects server-side"

            "lineNumber": 137,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "  return ("
          },
          {

            "text": "    \u003cform onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"mt-8 space-y-6\"\u003e"
          },

            "text": "export type ExamRequest = Tables\u003c\"exam_requests\"\u003e"

          },
          {

            "text": "// Variable definition structure for exam templates"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 359,
            "text": "export interface TemplateVariable {"

          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "export async function saveExamTemplate(rawData: any, templateId?: string) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "  const { supabase, user } = await getAuthUser();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "  const parsed = ExamTemplateSchema.safeParse(rawData);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "  if (!parsed.success) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    return { error: parsed.error.flatten().fieldErrors };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "  if (templateId) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "    const { error } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "      .from(\"exam_templates\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "      .update(parsed.data)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "      .eq(\"id\", templateId)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "      .eq(\"user_id\", user.id);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    if (error) return { error: error.message };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "  } else {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    const { error } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "      .from(\"exam_templates\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "      .insert({ ...parsed.data, user_id: user.id });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    if (error) return { error: error.message };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "  revalidatePath(\"/configuracoes/modelos\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "  return { success: true };"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "export async function deleteExamTemplate(templateId: string) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "  const { supabase, user } = await getAuthUser();"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 233,
            "text": "/**"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "text": " * Creates/Updates a standalone snapshot of the report in the exam_reports table."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235,
            "text": " * This mirror is used for future consultations independent of template changes."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236,
            "text": " */"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 237,
            "text": "async function upsertExamReport(itemId: string, providedSnapshot?: ExamFormSnapshot) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238,
            "text": "  const { supabase, user } = await getAuthUser();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "text": "  // 1. Fetch full context for the snapshot"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "text": "  const { data: item } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_items\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "text": "    .select(&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244,
            "text": "      form_snapshot,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245,
            "text": "      exam_templates ( title, technique, description, impression ),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246,
            "text": "      exam_requests ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247,
            "text": "        patient_id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248,
            "text": "        unit_id"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249,
            "text": "      )"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250,
            "text": "    &#96;)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251,
            "text": "    .eq(\"id\", itemId)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252,
            "text": "    .eq(\"user_id\", user.id)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253,
            "text": "    .single();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255,
            "text": "  if (!item || !item.exam_requests) return;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257,
            "text": "  const snapshot = providedSnapshot || (item.form_snapshot as unknown as ExamFormSnapshot);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "  const template = item.exam_templates as any;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "  const request = item.exam_requests as any;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "  // Render content with template defaults if snapshot is missing sections"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "  const content = generateReportHTML(snapshot, template);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "  const title = template?.title || \"LAUDO\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "  // 2. Upsert the mirror record"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "  await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_reports\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "    .upsert({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "      exam_item_id: itemId,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "      user_id: user.id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "      patient_id: request.patient_id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "      unit_id: request.unit_id,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "      title: title,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "      content: content,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "      updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "    }, {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277,
            "text": "      onConflict: \"exam_item_id\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 278
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 230
          }

        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\app\\(protected)\\laudos\\actions.ts",

      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "export function ModelSheet({ open, onOpenChange, template, units }: ModelSheetProps) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "  const [isPending, startTransition] = useTransition();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "  const [title, setTitle] = useState(\"\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "  const [unitId, setUnitId] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"all\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "  const [active, setActive] = useState(true);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "  const [technique, setTechnique] = useState(\"\");"

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },

          },
          {

            "text": "  // Editor instances for external control (variable insertion)"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "  const slugify = (text: string) =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "    return text"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "      .toLowerCase()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "      .normalize(\"NFD\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "      .replace(/[\\u0300-\\u036f]/g, \"\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "      .replace(/[^\\w\\s-]/g, \"\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "      .replace(/[\\s_-]+/g, \"_\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "      .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, \"\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "  useEffect(() =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "    if (open) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "      setTitle(template?.title ?? \"\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "      setUnitId(template?.unit_id ?? \"all\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "      setActive(template?.active ?? true);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "      setTechnique(template?.technique ?? \"\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "      setDescription(template?.description ?? \"\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "      setImpression(template?.impression ?? \"\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "      const parsedVars = (template?.variables as any[])?.map((v) =\u003e ({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "        ...v,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "        options: Array.isArray(v.options) ? v.options.join(\"; \") : v.options,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "      })) ?? [];"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "      "
          },
          {

            "text": "      setVariables(parsedVars);"

          {

            "text": "    }"

          {

            "text": "  }, [open, template]);"

          },

          {

          {

          },

          {

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "// ────── EXAM ITEMS ──────"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "/** Auto-save the exam item (draft). */"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "export async function saveExamItem("
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "  itemId: string,"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "  snapshot: Partial\u003cExamFormSnapshot\u003e"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": ") {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "  const parsed = SaveExamItemSchema.safeParse(snapshot);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "  if (!parsed.success) return { error: \"Dados inválidos\" };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "  const { supabase, user } = await getAuthUser();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "  const formSnapshot: ExamFormSnapshot = {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "    technique: parsed.data.technique ?? undefined,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "    description: parsed.data.description ?? undefined,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "    impression: parsed.data.impression ?? undefined,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "    variable_selections: parsed.data.variable_selections,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "  };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "  const { error } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_items\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "    .update({ form_snapshot: formSnapshot as unknown as Record\u003cstring, unknown\u003e, status: \"in_progress\" })"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "    .eq(\"id\", itemId)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "    .eq(\"user_id\", user.id);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "  if (error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "    console.error(\"Error saving exam item:\", error);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "    return { error: error.message };"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "  // Fetch the requestId to revalidate correctly"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "  const { data: item } = await supabase"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "    .from(\"exam_items\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "    .select(\"request_id\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145,
            "text": "    .eq(\"id\", itemId)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "    .single();"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "  if (item) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": "    revalidatePath(&#96;/laudos/${item.request_id}/${itemId}&#96;);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "  revalidatePath(\"/laudos\");"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "  // Mirror the report snapshot to exam_reports table"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "  try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "    await upsertExamReport(itemId, formSnapshot);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "  } catch (err) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "    console.error(\"Error mirroring report:\", err);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "  }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "  return { success: true };"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "/** Finalize the exam item, mark as completed. */"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "export async function finalizeExamItem(itemId: string, requestId: string) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "  const { supabase, user } = await getAuthUser();"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 205,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 204
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 108
          }

        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\app\\(protected)\\laudos\\actions.ts",

      },

            "lineNumber": 357

          },

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "          \u003c/SheetDescription\u003e"

            "text": "        \u003c/SheetHeader\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97
          },

            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "        \u003cform ref={formRef} onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-6 mt-6 pb-6\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "          \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-2\"\u003e"
          },

            "text": "            \u003cLabel htmlFor=\"name\" required\u003eNome Completo\u003c/Label\u003e"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "export function ModelSheet({ open, onOpenChange, template, units }: ModelSheetProps) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278,
            "text": "          \u003csection className=\"space-y-6\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 279,
            "text": "            \u003ch3 className=\"text-lg font-medium border-b pb-2\"\u003eModelo de Laudo\u003c/h3\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 280,
            "text": "            "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281,
            "text": "            \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-2\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282,
            "text": "              \u003cLabel\u003eTécnica\u003c/Label\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 283,
            "text": "              \u003cVariableChips onInsert={(name) =\u003e insertVariable(teqEditor, name)} /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284,
            "text": "              \u003cRichTextEditor value={technique} onChange={setTechnique} onReady={setTeqEditor} /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285,
            "text": "            \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287,
            "text": "            \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-2\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288,
            "text": "              \u003cLabel\u003eDescrição\u003c/Label\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 289,
            "text": "              \u003cVariableChips onInsert={(name) =\u003e insertVariable(descEditor, name)} /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 290,
            "text": "              \u003cRichTextEditor value={description} onChange={setDescription} onReady={setDescEditor} /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "text": "            \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "text": "            \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-2\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "text": "              \u003cLabel\u003eImpressão Mínima\u003c/Label\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "text": "              \u003cVariableChips onInsert={(name) =\u003e insertVariable(impEditor, name)} /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 296,
            "text": "              \u003cRichTextEditor value={impression} onChange={setImpression} onReady={setImpEditor} /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297,
            "text": "            \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 298,
            "text": "          \u003c/section\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300,
            "text": "          \u003cdiv className=\"flex gap-2 justify-end pt-4 border-t sticky bottom-0 bg-background py-4 z-10 mt-12\"\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301,
            "text": "            \u003cButton"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302,
            "text": "              type=\"button\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303,
            "text": "              variant=\"outline\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 304,
            "text": "              onClick={() =\u003e onOpenChange(false)}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305,
            "text": "            \u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306,
            "text": "              Cancelar"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 307,
            "text": "            \u003c/Button\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308,
            "text": "            \u003cButton type=\"submit\" disabled={isPending}\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 309,
            "text": "              {isPending ? ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 310,
            "text": "                \u003cLoader2 className=\"h-4 w-4 mr-2 animate-spin\" /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 311,
            "text": "              ) : ("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 312,
            "text": "                \u003cSave className=\"h-4 w-4 mr-2\" /\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 313,
            "text": "              )}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "              {template ? \"Salvar Modelo\" : \"Cadastrar Modelo\"}"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 315,
            "text": "            \u003c/Button\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316,
            "text": "          \u003c/div\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317,
            "text": "        \u003c/form\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "      \u003c/SheetContent\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "    \u003c/Sheet\u003e"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "  );"
          },
          {

          }

_**Agent (composer-1.5)**_


Implementei a ação de duplicar modelo de exame. Resumo do que foi feito:

## Alterações

### 1. **ModelsClient.tsx**
- Import do ícone `Copy`
- Função `handleDuplicate`: cria uma cópia do modelo com todos os dados (título, unidade, técnica, descrição, impressão, variáveis, ativo), adiciona " (Cópia)" ao título e remove o `id` para indicar criação em vez de edição
- Botão "Duplicar" em cada card de modelo
- Grid de botões passando de 2 para 3 colunas (Editar | Duplicar | Excluir)

### 2. **ModelSheet.tsx**
- Uso de `template?.id` em vez de `template` para distinguir edição de criação
- Quando há template sem `id` (duplicação), o sheet se comporta como "Novo Modelo" (título e botão de cadastrar)

## Fluxo

1. O usuário clica em "Duplicar" em um modelo
2. O sheet abre com os dados preenchidos
3. O título recebe " (Cópia)"
4. O usuário pode alterar e salvar
5. A ação de salvar cria um novo registro (sem `id`)
6. `revalidatePath` atualiza a lista de modelos

A duplicação preserva técnicas, descrições, impressões e variáveis dinâmicas do modelo original.
